_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: Pan-neuronal rescue of full-length, wild-type Nf1 restored metabolic rate to control levels (Fig. 7a, b).
details: Pan-neuronal rescue of full-length, wild-type Nf1 restored metabolic rate to control levels (p = 0.001 vs Nf1 P1/E1)
